full_prompt: Design one representative structural bay of a hyperscale data center main hall. The bay must be a single rectangular steel frame module 18.3 m (60 ft) by 12.2 m (40 ft) in plan and 7.6 m (25 ft) floor to underside of roof, built from ASTM A992 wide-flange steel primary columns and beams with a 150 mm thick reinforced concrete composite slab on metal deck at the roof carrying mechanical penthouse equipment. The bay must carry simultaneously a raised-floor equipment live load of 12.0 kPa across the full tenant floor to represent IT rack rows, a roof superimposed dead load of 2.4 kPa from mechanical and electrical equipment plus MEP distribution, a ground snow load of 1.44 kPa mapped to a roof snow of 1.0 kPa per ASCE 7-22 flat-roof conversion, a basic wind speed of 51 m/s (115 mph) applied as equivalent static pressure on the long elevation per ASCE 7-22 simplified method yielding a design wind pressure of 1.15 kPa, and a seismic lateral force equal to 10% of seismic weight applied at the roof level to represent a Site Class D Moderate seismicity design base shear coefficient of 0.10. Members are ASTM A992 with yield 345 MPa and ultimate 450 MPa, and the composite slab uses normal-weight concrete fc' of 27.6 MPa (4000 psi). All pass/fail criteria must be satisfied: (R1) steel member stress ratios per AISC 360-22 DCR must not exceed 1.0 under any load combination in ASCE 7-22 Section 2.3, (R2) roof slab midspan deflection under 1.0 live plus 1.0 dead must not exceed span/360 which is 34 mm for the 12.2 m short direction, (R3) inter-story lateral drift at the roof under seismic plus wind must not exceed H/400 which is 19 mm, (R4) the bay must meet a sustainability target of at least 50% steel recycled content and embodied carbon at or below 300 kg CO2e per square meter of floor. Vibration, thermal, fluid, and radiation analyses are not required; wind is applied as ASCE 7-22 equivalent static pressure and seismic as equivalent lateral force. Deliver a STEP AP242 assembly of the bay plus an energy and carbon report listing member DCR maxima, roof deflection, lateral drift, recycled content, and embodied carbon per square meter.
short_prompt:
Design one representative 18.3 x 12.2 m (60 x 40 ft) plan x 7.6 m (25 ft) floor-to-underside-of-roof structural bay of a hyperscale data-center main hall, built from ASTM A992 wide-flange primary columns and beams with a 150 mm reinforced-concrete composite slab on metal deck at the roof. Design per AISC 360-22 (DCR <= 1.0 under ASCE 7-22 Section 2.3 load combinations).

Load cases applied simultaneously.
- Raised-floor equipment live load 12.0 kPa across the tenant floor (IT rack rows).
- Roof superimposed dead 2.4 kPa (mechanical/MEP).
- Roof snow 1.0 kPa (ASCE 7-22 flat-roof conversion from 1.44 kPa ground snow).
- Wind: basic wind speed 51 m/s (115 mph) per ASCE 7-22 simplified method = 1.15 kPa equivalent static on the long elevation.
- Seismic: equivalent lateral force = 10% of seismic weight at the roof (Site Class D moderate seismicity, base-shear coefficient 0.10).
Also require roof slab midspan deflection under 1.0D+1.0L <= span/360 (34 mm on the 12.2 m short direction), roof drift under seismic+wind <= H/400 (19 mm), >=50% steel recycled content, and embodied carbon <= 300 kg CO2e / m^2 floor.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: Embodied carbon per floor area is computed from material EPDs via the sustainability rubric, not by FEA.

prompt.title: Hyperscale data center bay 18.3 m x 12.2 m
prompt.brief: Design one structural bay of a hyperscale data center main hall (18.3 m x 12.2 m x 7.6 m) in ASTM A992 steel with a composite roof slab, meeting ASCE 7-22 gravity/wind/seismic demand and an embodied-carbon target.

material.primary_steel: ASTM A992, Fy 345 MPa, Fu 450 MPa

load_cases.name: snow
load_cases.derivation: ground 1.44 kPa converted to flat-roof per ASCE 7-22

load_cases.name: wind
load_cases.derivation: 51 m/s basic wind at ASCE 7-22 simplified

objective.primary: pass all code DCRs and drift limits
objective.secondary: minimize embodied carbon per floor area

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: beam for columns and girders, shell for slab

exclusions_explained.vibration_analysis: Not a vibration-sensitive lab floor at this stage.
exclusions_explained.thermal_analysis: Thermal envelope sizing handled separately, not structural pass/fail.
exclusions_explained.fluid_analysis: Wind is applied as static per ASCE 7-22 simplified method.

eval_coverage: data-center operational floor live load 12 kPa
